revision.comment: Create module to return a table of regular expressions, sorted by descending popularity, for all redirects to a given template as of a certain date
--rm now-redundant bit
--regex for the 1st pipe and surrounding whitespace are purposefully omitted to give the calling modules more flexibility

Protected "[[Module:Template redirect regex]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 26510 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
+Redirects to [[Template:Taxonbar]]; --std date yyyy/m
i
--mention parent
include detection of direct calls to [[Module:Taxonbar]]
+[[Template:Short description]]; ce

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 9 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Template_redirect_regex]]
+[[Template:Short description]]; ce
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
+[[Template:Short description]]; ce
